overview: Based on the published agenda, this public meeting was scheduled to serve as an initial negotiations session between the Wausau Board of Education and the Wausau Education Association to exchange initial contract proposals for the 2026-27 school year. The meeting was expected to address labor negotiations between the district and its education employees' union, with potential for continued discussions in closed session under Wisconsin open meetings law exemptions.

agenda.item: INITIAL NEGOTIATIONS MEETING BETWEEN REPRESENTATIVES OF THE WAUSAU BOARD OF EDUCATION AND THE WAUSAU EDUCATION ASSOCIATION TO EXCHANGE INITIAL PROPOSALS IN WRITING FOR THE 2026-27 SCHOOL YEAR AND PURSUANT TO SECTIONS 19.86 AND 111.70(4)(CM)(2)

discussions.item: INITIAL NEGOTIATIONS MEETING — WAUSAU BOARD OF EDUCATION AND WAUSAU EDUCATION ASSOCIATION
discussions.body: The meeting was scheduled to facilitate an initial negotiations session in which representatives of the Wausau Board of Education and the Wausau Education Association were expected to exchange initial contract proposals in writing for the 2026-27 school year. The gathering was conducted pursuant to Wisconsin open meetings law sections 19.86 and 111.70(4)(cm), with provisions allowing the parties to continue negotiations in closed session if needed.

publicComment: No public comment period was included on this agenda.
actionItems: Board was expected to participate in exchange of initial written contract proposals with the Wausau Education Association for the 2026-27 school year
title: Public Meeting - 2026-07-01
